description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted human figure with an elongated, stretched torso and arms that extend horizontally far beyond normal proportions. The head and upper chest are relatively realistic, but the rest of the body is unnaturally elongated, merging into a wide, flat, and angular base that appears to be partially transparent or reflective. The surface of the extended sections has a smooth, almost plastic-like appearance, with some areas showing a dark, glossy finish. The figure's face is detailed, but the rest of the anatomy is abstracted and merged with the base structure. The overall form is surreal and does not correspond to a typical human posture or proportions, giving it an uncanny, sculptural quality.
description: A surreal, elongated human figure with a realistic head and chest, but unnaturally stretched arms and torso merging into a wide, glossy base. The object combines human features with abstract, sculptural extensions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, chest, and the wide, angular base extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme elongation of the torso and arm, with the head in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head and the symmetrical extension of the arms and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the stretched form and the merging of the body into the base.
attribute_clothing_type: no visible clothing; body appears unclothed or covered by a continuous sculptural surface
attribute_posture: unnaturally elongated and stretched, with arms extended horizontally
